package rulecoverage

func NegativeSaveInLoopFullModel() string {
    ruleID := "save_in_loop_full_model"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "GORM Save(...) writes full models inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
